mnemonics.title: SDLC Phases
mnemonics.content: Please Always Design Implement Test Deploy Maintain

acronyms.usage: The SDLC is a series of phases that a software project goes through from conception to delivery.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a spiral staircase, where each iteration builds upon the previous one.

analogies.analogy: Building a model of a house before constructing the actual house.
